text_block_list.text: I'm working in my office one day, when...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Trainer... Sorry to ask so suddenly, but may I
take a day off training today?
choice_data_list: What's wrong? Did something happen?
What's wrong? Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
During lunch, I caught a dear pony when she
missed a step on the stairs and almost fell.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hurt my foot in the process, and I don't think I
should run on it today.
choice_data_list:
Are you all right? Should I help you back to
your dorm?

Are you all right? Should I help you back to
your dorm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can still walk fine, so there's no need. I just want
to be safe and rest for today. I'll see you
tomorrow.

I get the feeling she's playing it cool in order not
to worry anyone, especially the student she
helped.

But there's a possibility Fuji Kiseki's injury could
get worse. I want to respect her judgment, so I
"casually" grab some get-well gifts for her from
the school store.

I get some of her favorite snacks and arrange
them in a bag so they hide the medicated
bandages I slipped in there. And then...
choice_data_list: Excuse me, can I ask you a favor?
Excuse me, can I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey! You're Fuji's trainer, right? What can I do
for you?
choice_data_list:
Could you deliver this to Fuji at her dorm,
please? She left it behind.

Could you deliver this to Fuji at her dorm,
please? She left it behind.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's stuffed with yummy snacks! She must be starving!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll get this to her in a jiffy, don't you worry!

The words are hardly out of her mouth before
she's running off.

I'm sure Fuji won't hesitate to accept a delivery
from someone as pure and innocent as Haru
Urara.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The swelling's gone down, but I probably
shouldn't go patrolling the dorm just yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Funny how I'm hiding away to conceal an injury
again, just like when I was a kid...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(That time, I'd hurt myself during rehearsal right
before a show. I wanted to whine and cry so
badly, like a regular kid.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(But since I was an actor first and foremost, the
show had to go on...)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Fuji! I was looking for you! You've got a parcel
from Urara's Special Delivery Service!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Why, if you aren't just the most adorable
mail courier in the world!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! ♪ Your trainer said you forgot this and
asked me to deliver it to you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Be careful not to forget your stuff next time,
'kay? Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I'm sure I didn't leave anything behind. Let's
see here... It's full of food and... Ah, I see.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Hey! How's your foot?
Hey! How's your foot?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's all better now, thanks to the little delivery I
received from Urara.
choice_data_list: I wish you'd lean on me more.
I wish you'd lean on me more.
We have to help each other in times of need!
We have to help each other in times of need!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's all better now, thanks to the little delivery I
received from Urara.
choice_data_list: I wish you'd lean on me more.
I wish you'd lean on me more.
We have to help each other in times of need!
We have to help each other in times of need!

text_block_list.text:
As Fuji Kiseki's trainer and a grown adult, I have a
responsibility to take care of her, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you for saying that. It's a relief
knowing how dependable you are.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Back when I was a child actor, I hurt myself pretty
badly. My injury yesterday reminded me of that
time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I bet things would've gone differently back then if
you had been there for me.
choice_data_list:
Was I able to give you the support you needed,
then?

Was I able to give you the support you needed,
then?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You definitely were.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're becoming more and more wily every day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You keep spoiling me and chipping away at my
disguise. You'd better take responsibility if I
become incapable of being without you.
choice_data_list: W-well, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I'm just messing with you. ♪ Come on,
let's start training!

I stare helplessly as she strolls off. If anyone is
wily, it's definitely Fuji Kiseki and not me.

I stare helplessly as she strolls off. If anyone is
wily, it's definitely Fuji Kiseki and not me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm, that is a good point.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to bring you something if you ever get
injured, then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can make you lots of nutritious food in my
dorm's kitchen, now that I think of it.
choice_data_list: Thanks, but I think your fans would get jealous.
Thanks, but I think your fans would get jealous.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd just have to visit you in secret, so as to
ensure no one finds out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You could be my Juliet, and I, your forbidden
Romeo...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'd wait for me then, wouldn't you, my fair
Juliet? ♪

I'm not sure if I should be looking forward to or
dreading being put in that situation...

But despite my mixed feelings, she looks so
cheerful that I can't help but smile back.
